case_title: PAUL TAM, TRUSTEE OF THE TAM FAMILY TRUST VS. PHAT TUAN LUU et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON OCT-16-2013 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT PHAT LUU'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAUL TAM, TRUSTEE OF THE TAM FAMILY TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUU, PHAT TUAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 729 HYDE STREET # 5 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, HOLDOVER DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1064.00, COSTS PURSUANT TO MEMO. Appearances:
Plaintiff Paul Tam, Trustee of the Tam Family Trust is present. Represented by Paul Tam.
Attorney, Daniel Cheung is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Phat Tuan Luu is present.
Attorney, Teresa L. Friend is representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Toni Young , litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 502B , for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of November 04, 2013 remains on calendar.
